---
name: fehem-stitch-skill
description: "Use when: generating or updating DESIGN.md for Google Stitch-style semantic design exports with explicit visual and interaction rules."
---

# Fehem Stitch Skill

## Goal
Produce a high-quality `DESIGN.md` that acts as a single source of truth for AI screen generation.

## Required Sections
1. Visual theme and atmosphere
2. Color palette and semantic roles
3. Typography system
4. Component behavior rules
5. Layout and responsive rules
6. Motion philosophy
7. Banned patterns

## Writing Rules
1. Use descriptive language plus precise values.
2. Keep one accent color strategy.
3. Define how the design behaves on mobile.
4. Encode explicit anti-patterns to prevent generic outputs.
5. Prefer clarity over jargon.

## Fehem Context
When relevant, include guidance for:
- learning dashboards
- course document workflows
- quiz and group collaboration UI states
